### Maintenance Task Description
A clear and concise description of the maintenance task (cleanup, refactor, etc.).

### Files/Areas to Focus On
List any specific files, directories, or areas of the codebase that need attention.

### Expected Outcome
What do you expect to achieve with this maintenance task?

### Additional Context
Add any other context or details about the maintenance task here.
